---
name: Task
about: Track a task or small piece of work
title: "[TASK] %short summary%"
labels: task
assignees: ''
---

## Short description
One-line summary of the task.

## Why
Explain why this task is needed and what it enables.

## Scope / Acceptance
- [ ] Deliverable 1 (clear, testable)
- [ ] Deliverable 2
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

## Steps
Provide a checklist of steps to complete this task.
- [ ] Step 1
- [ ] Step 2
- [ ] Step 3

## Dependencies
List any external dependencies (PRs, design assets, API keys, etc.).

## Estimate
Rough estimate (e.g., 2d, 1w)

## Owner / Assignee
Who will be responsible for implementation and review.
